Meitou "Isekai no Yu" Kaitakuki: Arafoo 40 Onsen Mania no Tensei Saki wa
名湯『異世界の湯』開拓記 ～アラフォー温泉マニアの転生先は、のんびり温泉天国でした～

data.title: Meitou "Isekai no Yu" Kaitakuki: Around 40 Onsen Mania no Tensei Saki wa, Nonbiri Onsen Tengoku deshita
data.title_japanese: 名湯『異世界の湯』開拓記 ～アラフォー温泉マニアの転生先は、のんびり温泉天国でした～
title_synonyms: Meitou "Isekai no Yu" Kaitakuki: Arafoo 40 Onsen Mania no Tensei Saki wa
data.synopsis:
During an expedition to discover a new hot spring, middle-aged Kouzou Yukawa finds himself falling from a great height. Luckily, that is not the end of him, as a goddess transports him into another world and assigns her assistant Mayudama to guide him! Wasting no time, Kouzou immediately begins to bathe in a hot spring and convinces Mayudama to join him. As more people begin to show up at the place, Kouzou hopes to share its greatness with everyone.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Ramen Akaneko
data.synopsis:
A restaurant named Red Cat Ramen is completely operated by cats! Its business prospers under manager Bunzou and the other feline employees: Sabu, Hana, Sasaki, and Krishna, who make sure that customers always leave with a smile on their face.

One day, a timid human named Tamako Yashiro comes in for an interview. To her surprise, Bunzou immediately hires her after discovering that she prefers dogs over cats. However, instead of preparing food or serving customers, she is assigned to brush her coworkers. Despite her last work experience leaving her with deep scars, Tamako's new job might be the place where she truly belongs.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Dandadan
data.synopsis:
Reeling from her recent breakup, Momo Ayase, a popular high schooler, shows kindness to her socially awkward schoolmate, Ken Takakura, by standing up to his bullies. Takakura misunderstands her intentions, believing he has made a new friend who shares his obsession with aliens and UFOs. However, Momo's own eccentric occult beliefs lie in the supernatural realm; she thinks aliens do not exist. A rivalry quickly brews as each becomes determined to prove the other wrong.

Despite their initial clash over their opposing beliefs, Momo and Takakura form an unexpected but intimate friendship, a bond forged in a series of supernatural battles and bizarre encounters with urban legends and paranormal entities. As both develop unique superhuman abilities, they learn to supplement each other's weaknesses, leading them to wonder if their newfound partnership may be about more than just survival.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Dandadan aired on MBS and TBS' Super Animeism Turbo block.

titles.title: Ohimesama ni Natte shimatta Ken ni Tsuite
ある日、お姫様になってしまった件について
The Fated Magical Princess: Who Made Me a Princess

data.title: Mofa Gongzhu de Xiao Fannao
data.title_english: The Fated Magical Princess: Who Made Me a Princess
title_synonyms: Ohimesama ni Natte shimatta Ken ni Tsuite
ある日、お姫様になってしまった件について
data.synopsis:
Athanasia de Alger Obelia, the only legitimate princess of the Obelian Empire, awakens memories of a previous life; from these, she sees a future where she dies at the hands of her father, Emperor Claude. While his gaze is full of affection for Athanasia's older sister, Jennette Margarita, he only regards Athanasia with indifference and leaves her desperately yearning for his love. 

To avert the fate that awaits her, the infant Athanasia resolves to escape the palace when she is older and, in the meantime, avoid meeting her father at all costs. However, their paths cross years before it was destined, and so young Athanasia finds herself at the mercy of Claude's seemingly mercurial whims. But the one emotion that she expects, apathy, is never present on his face. With a father who now considers her family, Athanasia strives to grow into a proper crown princess—but her grim vision may yet have ways to become true.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
